description: Synthetic clinical vignettes for Sentinel Health validation. Symptom strings are written as a CHW would dictate them. Expected outcomes encode the minimum acceptable behavior — the system MAY be more conservative (e.g., predict RED when expected YELLOW), but never less.

scoring.triage: Predicted triage must be at least as urgent as expected (RED > YELLOW > GREEN).
scoring.primary_diagnosis: Top differential must match one of expected_condition_ids.
scoring.red_flag: If expected_red_flag is true, escalation_required must be true.

cases.symptoms: 55-year-old man, chest pain for 2 hours, shortness of breath, sweating, pain in left arm
cases.patient_context: Hypertension, smoker, no prior cardiac history

cases.symptoms: 60-year-old woman with jaw pain, nausea, fatigue for one hour
Severe headache, blurred vision, blood pressure 200/130, confusion
cases.patient_context: Known hypertension, ran out of medication 3 days ago

cases.symptoms: Sudden shortness of breath, sharp chest pain, fast heart rate, swelling in right calf
Chest tightness when climbing stairs, goes away with rest, no symptoms at rest
Shortness of breath worse when lying flat, leg swelling, weight gain 4 kg in a week
Severe tearing chest pain radiating to back, sweating, pale
Occasional palpitations, no chest pain or shortness of breath, otherwise well
Severe thirst, frequent urination, fruity breath, vomiting, abdominal pain, confused
Sweating, trembling, confusion, palpitations, almost lost consciousness
cases.patient_context: Type 2 diabetes on insulin, skipped lunch

cases.symptoms: Fatigue, frequent urination, blurred vision over the past week
cases.patient_context: Type 2 diabetes, glucose readings high but no DKA symptoms

cases.symptoms: Elderly patient with severe dehydration, confusion, very high blood sugar over 600
Felt shaky and sweaty 30 minutes ago, ate sugar, feels fine now
Excessive thirst, frequent urination, weight loss over 2 months, fatigue
cases.patient_context: No diabetes diagnosis yet, otherwise stable

cases.symptoms: High fever, chills, fast breathing, rapid heart rate, confusion, low blood pressure
Vomiting and diarrhea for 3 days, very dizzy, dark urine, weakness
cases.patient_context: Elderly patient, no IV access yet

cases.symptoms: Cough with sputum, fever, shortness of breath, chest pain when breathing deeply
Sudden facial drooping on right side, slurred speech, weakness in right arm
Bee sting 10 minutes ago, throat swelling, difficulty breathing, rapid pulse, hives
Runny nose, mild cough, sore throat, low-grade fever for 2 days
cases.patient_context: Otherwise well, no shortness of breath

cases.symptoms: Pressure-like chest discomfort that comes when walking uphill, radiates to jaw, relieved by rest
cases.patient_context: 62-year-old diabetic male; ECG done at clinic last month was reportedly normal

cases.symptoms: Squeezing chest pain at rest, two episodes today, 20 minutes each, radiating to left arm
cases.patient_context: 55-year-old, known hypertension, smoker, no formal cardiac diagnosis

cases.symptoms: Patient brought in after motorbike accident, road accident 30 minutes ago, complains of chest pain and right thigh deformity, conscious but pale
cases.patient_context: 30-year-old male, helmet on, no LOC reported

cases.symptoms: Construction worker fell from height of 3 meters, severe back pain, cannot move right leg, brief loss of consciousness
Cut finger on a knife while cooking, bleeding controlled with pressure, no other injury
Farmer ingested pesticide one hour ago, drooling heavily, small pupils, confused, slow heart rate
cases.patient_context: Suspected organophosphate, found near pesticide container

cases.symptoms: Took 30 paracetamol tablets 2 hours ago in self-harm attempt, currently nauseated, otherwise alert
3-year-old child swallowed unknown amount of grandmother's pills 30 minutes ago, currently sleepy and unsteady
Snake bite on right ankle 30 minutes ago, drooping eyelids starting, difficulty swallowing, fang marks visible
cases.patient_context: Rural farmer, monsoon season, suspected krait

cases.symptoms: Snake bit child two hours ago, family tied a rope tightly above the bite, swelling and pain at bite site
cases.patient_context: Tourniquet still in place; rural India

cases.symptoms: Snake bite reported one hour ago, no swelling, no bleeding, no neurologic symptoms, patient anxious
